items.title: Analysts Remain Split on Solstice Advanced Materials (SOLS) Despite Expansion Investments
items.description: Solstice Advanced Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:SOLS) is among the spin-off companies in 2025. In October 2024, the company’s parent, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON), approved the spin-off of its Advanced Materials business into an independent, U.S. publicly traded company. The spin-off was completed on October 30, 2025, through a pro rata distribution to Honeywell shareholders, who received one […]

items.title: This 1 Cheap Quantum Computing Stock Could Be a Top Buy for 2026
items.description: Honeywell stock is down 8% in 2025 and remains an attractive investment, given its majority stake in Quantinuum, a quantum computing company.
